title: ProviderConfig pricingModel + usageProxy.ts (cloud/metered/free)
description: Add pricingModel: 'paid'|'free'|'metered' to ProviderConfig. Annotate every entry: anthropic/openai/kimi/glm/minimax/dashscope/openrouter/ollama-cloud/kimi-coding → paid; groq/deepseek/gemini/nvidia → metered; ollama-local + custom-with-localhost → free. Auto-classifier for user-created customs. usageProxy.ts: Tier 2 cost-from-tokens + Tier 3 launch-count fallback.

context.text: Done via /vy-go 2026-05-20. Merged work/T-DASH-025 into main via merge commit 7036407 after worker commit dc07ad8. Added ProviderConfig pricingModel annotations, custom provider classifier, and usageProxy Tier 2 token-cost plus Tier 3 launch-count estimators with focused tests. Proof: npm test -- --runInBand passed with 99 suites passed, 2383 tests passed, 5 skipped; npm run build passed; npx tsc --noEmit passed; npm audit --audit-level=moderate found 0 vulnerabilities; cd macos-menubar/SweechBar && swift build passed; git diff --check passed.
